Sharma About Doctor Dr. Divya Sharma, MBBS Gold Medalist and MD (Skin), is a trusted dermatologist in Whitefield Bangalore . With over 12 years of experience, she is widely recognized as a top skin specialist in Bangalore . She completed her training at the renowned IG Government Medical College Shimla and has worked at St. John's Medical College and Apollo Hospitals. She now runs her own AECS Layout skin clinic , equipped with world-class technology to handle all concerns. Whether you need acne treatment Bangalore , pigmentation treatment Bangalore , or advanced hair loss treatment Bangalore , her clinic provides customized, evidence-based care. Read More Book An Appointment ABOUT CLINIC Skin and Hair Solutions has been conceived and developed by one of the best dermatologists in Whitefield, Bangalore Dr. Divya Sharma, MD. The aim is to provide comprehensive solution and excellence in dermatology, pediatric dermatology and trichology in the fast dwindling art of practicing genuine Dermatology. Conveniently located in the heart of Whitefield at AECS layout Brookfield, Dr. Divya’s Skin and Hair Solutions is a comprehensive dermatologic medical facility and valuable dermatology resource, dedicated to all facets of the largest vital part of your body – your skin. Consult with the best Dr. Divya's Skin and Hair solutions (DSHS) is headed by Dr. Divya Sharma who is an MBBS and MD (Gold medalist) and is an acclaimed dermatologist and hair expert in Bengaluru. She is widely respected for her research and practice in the field of dermatology and is on the panel of several national dermatology forums Patient Centred Care We maintain the transparency of the patient-doctor relationship. At Dr. Divya's skin & hair solutions (DSHS) we believe in empowerment and make patients aware of the condition, prevention strategies, and effective treatment options. You will never walk out with a 5-minute consultation, the doctor is known to spend time and understand the skin issue. Shared Values Genuine and ethical practice is our hallmark. We are driven by the importance of prevention, early diagnosis, and treatment. Latest and advanced technology Today's global patients and clients need the most advanced choices. All our technology is US FDA approved, and we have the world's best technologies from the US, Israel, and Europe. Initially, I thought the medicines are slightly expensive but now realized these are quality products and skin medicines are generally expensive. She had explained the in and out of all my problems and had also given a lot of useful suggestions and precautions. M.H Manhar Hadiyal Source : Facebook *Opinions/Results may vary from person to person. I was having boils from many years. I visited many doctors in past but non of them was able to cure it.Some days back I visited Dr Divya and surprisingly she diagnosed it with deficiency of Vitamin B12 and problem of cholesterol. She asked me to do some tests and report also confirmed deficiency of Vitamin B12 and Cholesterol problem.She told that it is one of the reason of loosing hairs as well.I recommend Dr Divya to all people who are facing any issue of skin.She explains the problem very and listen patiently. G Gaurav Source : Practo *Opinions/Results may vary from person to person. It's the first time I Visited her. I was quite impressed by the customer service, the cleanliness of the clinic, very courteous staff. Dr.Divya was very friendly, polite and heard me out completely about my problems and asked me what other treatments I had taken.
She examined and explained the issue and the treatment she would be doing on the skin. She was clear in her explanation on how I should be taking the medicine and was willing to clear all my doubts.She asked me what my budget range was to prescribe the medicines accordingly. They have an in-house pharmacy as well. I would definitely recommend Dr. Divya. L.H Lincy Hepsiba Source : Practo *Opinions/Results may vary from person to person. Today's consultation was awesome. I can not describe in words. She has tried to address almost all the issues that I had to be it related to acne, hair and back pimples. Every now and then I have mentioned this fact that Whenever I come for a consultation, I always feel like a home away from home Dr. Divya gives an optimized treatment which helps to address the root cause of the problem. Every meeting with mam is better than the previous one. Mam is setting high standards for other doctors which is really difficult to emulate. A.M Amit Kumar Source : Practo *Opinions/Results may vary from person to person. I have been visiting her clinic since last nine months. Her charisma itself will make you feel so comfortable when you talk to her. I was continuously suffering from acne since my childhood. Visited too many doctors but nobody could cure it ever. They kept prescribing me different medicines which did not give good results. But dr.divya was the only doctor who was able to figure out the cause in no time in my first visit and till date, I have seen a lot of improvements in my skin. Thanks a ton to her. L.G Lajbanti Ghosh Source : Google *Opinions/Results may vary from person to person. Dr. Divya is an experienced and friendly doctor. Her treatment has improved my skin issues within 2 days which I could not get relief from last many years. I had consulted multiple doctors for the same issue but never got relief which I got in just 2 days and I am hoping this improvement will continue. She suggested some simple methods of treatment like avoiding soap, water which was never suggested by any doctor and of course the medicines and ointments are helping. Her explanation of the problem was simple and clear. I am extremely thankful to her and happy that I have finally reached the right place.
